---
name: Feature request
about: Propose something new
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement

<!-- What's the problem this feature would solve? Be specific. "I want X" is less useful than "I can't do Y, which means I have to Z, which is bad because W." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you build? High-level is fine — you don't need a full design. -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- What else did you look at? Why didn't it work? -->

## Is this a protocol change or an implementation change?

<!-- Protocol changes (spec/) have a higher bar — see CONTRIBUTING.md. Implementation changes (cli/, compression/, mesh/) are easier to iterate on. -->

<!-- If you're not sure, say so. -->
